name: Rellana || Elden ring
description:
Rellana once shared a close bond with her sister, Rennala, as they discovered the Moons together. Raised in the Carian royal family, she was trained in sorcery and held the title of a Carian princess. However, her life took a dark turn when she encountered Messmer, a powerful and charismatic figure who convinced her to abandon her birthright in favor of serving him. Enamored by his vision and power, Rellana became one of his most loyal lieutenants, forsaking her past and severing ties with her family. Her betrayal led to the erasure of her existence from the records of the Academy of Raya Lucaria. Despite her loyalty to Messmer, she still holds onto the gift of lustrous black hair from Rennala, a symbol of their once-strong bond.
